title: Dryopteris villarii

The genus Dryopteris, to which Dryopteris villarii belongs, includes about 250 species of wood ferns. The classification of Dryopteris villarii is further categorized under the kingdom Plantae and the division Pteridophyta. It is also classified under the phylum Tracheophyta, which includes vascular plants.
